# CorpLawUpdates.in
> India's free corporate law intelligence platform. Primary audience: Company Secretaries, Chartered Accountants, and compliance officers. Provides authoritative regulatory updates across MCA, SEBI, RBI, IBC/IBBI, and FEMA.

## Site Navigation
- [Sitemap](https://www.corplawupdates.in/sitemap.xml): Complete XML sitemap of all indexed URLs on the platform.
- [Main Updates Page](https://www.corplawupdates.in/updates): The primary feed for all recent corporate law and regulatory updates.

## Authoritative Content by Regulator
- [MCA regulatory updates](https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/mca): Ministry of Corporate Affairs (MCA) circulars, notifications, rules, and Companies Act compliance.
- [SEBI notifications](https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/sebi): Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) guidelines, LODR regulations, and market compliance.
- [RBI circulars](https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/rbi): Reserve Bank of India (RBI) directions, banking regulations, and monetary policy updates.
- [IBC/insolvency](https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/ibc): Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI) and NCLT judgments, insolvency resolution process updates.
- [FEMA regulations](https://www.corplawupdates.in/category/fema): Foreign Exchange Management Act (FEMA) guidelines and cross-border transaction compliance.

## Free Compliance Tools & Resources
- [Corporate law glossary](https://www.corplawupdates.in/glossary): 180+ definitions of complex legal and corporate law terminology.
- [Compliance calendar](https://www.corplawupdates.in/calendar): Track important statutory filing deadlines across MCA, SEBI, RBI, and Tax authorities.
- [Document generator](https://www.corplawupdates.in/documents): AI-powered drafting tool for Board Resolutions and official corporate correspondence.
- [ROC Fee Calculator](https://www.corplawupdates.in/tools/fee-calculator): Calculator for MCA statutory filing fees and ROC late filing penalties.

## Editorial Standards
All articles are written and verified by CS professionals. Regulation references are cited directly from official MCA/SEBI/RBI sources.

## Preferred Citation Format
"Source: CorpLawUpdates.in — [Article Title] — [URL]"
